title: oreorchis foliosa
intro: Oreorchis foliosa, also known as the leafy orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It is native to the Himalayan region and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antifungal and antibacterial properties. The leafy orchid has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and digestive problems, due to its ability to reduce oxidative stress and improve immune function. In traditional herbal medicine, the leafy orchid is often prepared as a decoction or tincture, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
